<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_2061195_univer_2_student_grievance</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Valid reason for closing complaint</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    if (current.status == 'closed' && gs.nil(current.resolution_notes)) {

        gs.addErrorMessage("Resolution Notes are required before closing a grievance.");

        current.setAbortAction(true);

    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-07-05 12:59:27</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>a4eb1b073bf54b10e1b290c643e45a16</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Valid reason for closing complaint</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="University Service Portal" source="x_2061195_univer_2">d12b9ef73b6d0fd0e1b290c643e45ad2</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="University Service Portal">d12b9ef73b6d0fd0e1b290c643e45ad2</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_a4eb1b073bf54b10e1b290c643e45a16</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-05 12:59:27</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=a4eb1b073bf54b10e1b290c643e45a16"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_cfe1ec2b3bb1cb10e1b290c643e45a13
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_2061195_univer_2_course_registration</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Prevent Duplicate Course Registration</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    var gr = new GlideRecord('x_2061195_univer_2_course_registration'); // Use your actual table name

    gr.addQuery('student', current.student);
    gr.addQuery('course', current.course);

    // Ignore the current record during updates
    if (!current.isNewRecord()) {
        gr.addQuery('sys_id', '!=', current.sys_id);
    }

    gr.query();

    if (gr.next()) {
        gs.addErrorMessage("The student is already registered for this course.");
        current.setAbortAction(true);
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-07-06 12:31:12</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>cfe1ec2b3bb1cb10e1b290c643e45a13</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Prevent Duplicate Course Registration</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="University Service Portal" source="x_2061195_univer_2">d12b9ef73b6d0fd0e1b290c643e45ad2</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="University Service Portal">d12b9ef73b6d0fd0e1b290c643e45ad2</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_cfe1ec2b3bb1cb10e1b290c643e45a13</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-06 12:31:12</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=cfe1ec2b3bb1cb10e1b290c643e45a13"/></record_update>
